description_long: This house features a single-story structure with stone-textured exterior walls and a flat roof. The front yard is landscaped with lush green grass, two large flowering trees, and a decorative pergola supported by white columns. The house has large windows and glass doors, allowing ample natural light into the interior, which is partially visible and includes blue-painted walls and wooden furniture. The entryway is marked by a modern white gate with geometric cutouts and is flanked by stone pillars and wooden fencing. The backyard area is open and includes additional greenery and a paved path. The overall design blends modern and classical elements, creating a welcoming residential environment.
description: A single-story stone house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring flowering trees, a pergola, and a modern entry gate.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with large glass doors, the pergola with white columns, and two prominent flowering trees in the yard.
description_view_1: This angle shows the front facade with the main entry gate, stone walls, and a clear view of the interior layout and staircase.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear of the house, the large windows, and the pergola area with the flowering trees.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the main entryway, the modern white gate, and the symmetrical arrangement of the two flowering trees and stone pillars.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Modern white gate with geometric cutouts, flanked by stone pillars and wooden fencing, no porch or steps
